scripts.dev:identity: cd backend && pnpm nest start identity --watch
scripts.dev:appointment: cd backend && pnpm nest start appointment --watch
scripts.dev:admin: cd backend && pnpm nest start admin --watch
scripts.dev: pnpm db:up && concurrently -n "Identity,Appointment,Admin,Web" -c "magenta,blue,cyan,green" "pnpm dev:identity" "pnpm dev:appointment" "pnpm dev:admin" "pnpm dev:frontend"
